## What I Just Did
Completed the Iteration 002 retrospective.

## Why I Stopped
Iteration closeout requires a human verdict.

## What Needs Your Review
Review the retrospective and decide whether to close the iteration.

## What Happens Next
A human approval would authorize only retro to iteration-closeout.

## Discussion Prompts
No open prompt.

## What I Need From You
Reply with approved for iteration-closeout, send back, or discuss.

<hook_prompt hook_run_id="stop:2:C:\Users\alon\.codex\hooks.json">Specrew: this Stop followed material work, but the required context packet was not rendered. If you already approved, please re-confirm; give the boundary verdict to authorize it.</hook_prompt>
